prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次分别为约78210→84118→85016→86311→101513名，整体呈持续后移趋势，尤其2025年较2024年大幅后移约15202名，主要受当年招生计划大幅扩招影响；2025年基准位次约101513名；该校在广东省物理类招生计划：2021年31人、2022年36人、2023年40人、2024年38人、2025年72人（较2024年扩招约89.5%）、2026年（招生计划文件）80人，较2025年继续扩招约11.1%，扩招趋势延续但幅度收窄，对竞争压力有缓解作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 石河子大学为211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名近年持续上升：2021年第165名→2022年第157名→2023年第138名→2024年第136名→2025年第140名→2026年第135名，排名稳中有升，体现学校综合实力逐步增强；2022年声誉评价偏负面，主要涉及宿舍改造问题（南区宿舍条件较差），但近年无重大负面舆情；抖音热度排名第58位，评价为"较热"，综合热度约55万，在211高校中关注度中等偏上，张雪峰等升学规划师曾推荐该校为"分数最低的211"之一，对低分段考生有一定吸引力；第五轮学科评估中石河子大学暂无A-及以上等级学科，优势学科主要集中在农业、医学、师范等领域，与该校综合性定位相符；临床医学、化学工程与工艺等专业在新疆地区具有较强实力，但全国范围内学科竞争力相对有限。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等专业社会热度持续偏热至高热，临床医学、口腔医学等医学类专业保持推荐热度；土木建筑、生化环材等专业仍处于劝退状态。广东省物理类考生总数：2021年约33.8万→2022年约39.9万→2023年约41.0万→2024年约45.1万→2025年约44.0万→2026年约45.6万，2026年较2025年增加约1.6万人（+3.6%），考生规模扩大加剧整体竞争；石河子大学位于新疆，距广东省较远，地域偏好对广东考生报考意愿有一定抑制作用；该校在广东省招生计划近年持续增加（从31人增至80人），反映出对广东生源的重视，但跨省就读的交通成本和生活适应问题仍是部分考生的顾虑因素。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次大幅后移的基准、2026年招生计划继续扩招约11.1%对竞争的缓解作用、广东省物理类考生增加约3.6%带来的竞争加剧、学校软科排名稳步提升的正面信号、抖音热度中等偏上的关注度，以及地域偏远对报考意愿的抑制，预计2026年最低录取位次在2025年101513名基础上继续后移，但后移幅度较2025年明显收窄；预测最低位次约108130名，波动区间107630–108630名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 电气工程及其自动化
- 软件工程（NIIT班）
- 临床医学
- 会计学
- 无人驾驶航空器系统工程。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 计算机类（含计算机科学与技术、软件工程等）
- 电子信息工程
- 机械设计制造及其自动化
- 审计学
- 化学工程与工艺
- 新能源科学与工程
- 数字经济。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 工商管理类（含财务管理、工商管理、人力资源管理、市场营销）
- 经济学类（含金融学、经济学、国际经济与贸易）
- 土木工程
- 给排水科学与工程
- 应用化学
- 葡萄与葡萄酒工程。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间107630–108630名内，建议以二档专业为主攻方向、一档专业作为冲刺、三档专业作为保底。若位次明显优于区间下限（如低于107630名），可重点冲刺电气工程及其自动化、临床医学、软件工程等热门专业；若位次接近区间上限，建议优先考虑二档中的计算机类、电子信息工程等就业前景较好的专业，并确保三档专业保底。石河子大学作为211高校，在分数偏低的情况下具有较高性价比，适合注重学校层次而非地域的考生。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 78,210 → 84,118 → 85,016 → 86,311 → 101,513, showing a continuous backward trend, especially in 2025 with a significant backward shift of about 15,202 places compared to 2024, mainly due to a large expansion of enrollment that year; the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 101,513; the university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Guangdong: 31 in 2021, 36 in 2022, 40 in 2023, 38 in 2024, 72 in 2025 (an expansion of about 89.5% compared to 2024), and 80 in 2026 (according to enrollment plan documents), continuing to expand by about 11.1% compared to 2025, with the expansion trend continuing but narrowing, which alleviates competitive pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Shihezi University is a Project 211 and Double First-Class construction university; its Soft Science China University Rankings have been steadily rising in recent years: 165th in 2021 → 157th in 2022 → 138th in 2023 → 136th in 2024 → 140th in 2025 → 135th in 2026, showing a stable upward trend, reflecting the gradual enhancement of the university's overall strength; in 2022, the reputation evaluation was somewhat negative, mainly involving dormitory renovation issues (poor conditions in the southern district dormitories), but there have been no major negative public opinions in recent years; Douyin popularity ranking is 58th, with an evaluation of "relatively hot," comprehensive popularity of about 550,000, indicating medium to high attention among 211 universities; study planners like Zhang Xuefeng have recommended this university as "one of the lowest-scoring 211s," which attracts low-scoring candidates to some extent; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Shihezi University has no disciplines rated A- or above, with advantageous disciplines mainly in agriculture, medicine, and teacher training, consistent with its comprehensive positioning; majors like Clinical Medicine and Chemical Engineering and Technology have strong strength in Xinjiang, but their competitiveness nationwide is relatively limited.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Geography
专业热度与地域.text: Majors like Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to be hot to very hot in social popularity, while Clinical Medicine and Stomatology maintain recommended popularity; majors like Civil Engineering, Biology, Chemistry, Environment, and Materials are still in a discouraged state. The total number of Physics Category candidates in Guangdong: approximately 338,000 in 2021 → 399,000 in 2022 → 410,000 in 2023 → 451,000 in 2024 → 440,000 in 2025 → 456,000 in 2026, with an increase of about 16,000 (+3.6%) in 2026 compared to 2025, intensifying overall competition; Shihezi University is located in Xinjiang, far from Guangdong, and geographical preferences have a certain inhibitory effect on the willingness of Guangdong candidates to apply; the university's enrollment plan in Guangdong has been increasing in recent years (from 31 to 80), reflecting its emphasis on Guangdong students, but the transportation costs and life adaptation issues of cross-province study remain concerns for some candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant backward shift in rankings in 2025 as a baseline, the continued enrollment expansion of about 11.1% in 2026 alleviating competition, the increase of about 3.6% in Guangdong Physics Category candidates intensifying competition, the positive signal of steadily rising Soft Science rankings, the medium to high attention on Douyin, and the inhibitory effect of remote geography on application willingness, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will continue to shift backward from the 101,513 in 2025, but the magnitude of the shift will be significantly narrower than in 2025; the predicted minimum ranking is about 108,130, with a fluctuation range of 107,630–108,630.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Electrical Engineering and Automation
- Software Engineering (NIIT Class)
- Clinical Medicine
- Accounting
- Unmanned Aerial Vehicle Systems Engineering.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Computer Science (including Computer Science and Technology, Software Engineering, etc.)
- Electronic Information Engineering
- Mechanical Design, Manufacturing and Automation
- Auditing
- Chemical Engineering and Technology
- New Energy Science and Engineering
- Digital Economy.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Business Administration (including Financial Management, Business Administration, Human Resource Management, Marketing)
- Economics (including Finance, Economics, International Economics and Trade)
- Civil Engineering
- Water Supply and Drainage Science and Engineering
- Applied Chemistry
- Viticulture and Enology.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 107,630–108,630, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main direction, Tier 1 majors as a sprint, and Tier 3 majors as a safety net. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., below 107,630), you can focus on sprinting for popular majors like Electrical Engineering and Automation, Clinical Medicine, and Software Engineering; if your ranking is close to the upper limit, it is recommended to prioritize Tier 2 majors with good employment prospects such as Computer Science and Electronic Information Engineering, and ensure Tier 3 majors as a safety net. As a 211 university, Shihezi University offers high cost-performance for lower scores, suitable for candidates who value university level over geography.
